This is basically you and Satoru being pick me's for eachother 😭

omg satoru you’re so funny 😂 omg satoru i want you so bad 😂😍😂😍😂 - nat

SOOOOOO—let's talk about that discord server y'all have been asking for.

I've said this A LOT and y'all are probably tired of hearing it but I've been trying to avoid public social media for a while due to personal reasons, which is why I was so hesitant on making a tumblr (still hesitant on actually posting and using it) and have been iffy on making a discord 😩

I actually do have a discord account! I made it earlier this year but deleted the app cause yeah + idk how tf discord works...

My discord if y'all want it: @downwhorendous_

Anyways I thought I'd let y'all know why I'm being so difficult about the server:

- Activity
I post daily but I am a busy person, meaning I would probably be too preoccupied with school to actually moderate and interact with the server

!! I am aware that discord allows for moderators and positions where other people can also help with the server, but I'd think it'd be super mean of me to rely on **other** people to manage **my** server for me, especially when they have their own lives and responsibilities !!

- Me
I'm assuming y'all would expect me to text and talk in this server...
I am SUCH an awkward person—it's actually painful.
I can't hold or carry a conversation for shit, I also **constantly** run into the problem of something happening IRL and I'm forced to abandon the conversation, in short, I'm terrible at conversation and have bad luck.

- OSP
Online safety paranoia 😍
A few people already know about my current situation but online safety is something I am EXTREMELY paranoid about, not that I assume all of you are serial killers out to get me—it's just a very persistent fear of mine.

Anyways, thats my TED talk on that. It's not completely hopeless though, I was thinking maybe when the summer starts, I could possibly start a server since obviously I'll have my own time 😋

(I'll probably paste this mini rant on my announcement doc and other captions)

anyways,

Enjoy!!!

Love,

Mama Down
